title: Sore throat with mild fever — minor infection
source: Synthetic case based on Manchester Triage System flowchart 'Sore Throat'

patient.name: Emily Watson
patient.chief_complaint: Sore throat for 3 days with mild fever, able to swallow liquids and solids without difficulty
patient.notes: Pharynx mildly erythematous, no exudate. No cervical lymphadenopathy. No stridor or drooling. Able to swallow normally. Well-appearing.
